documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 3 implements observability + state: @tesseract/run-logger (JSONL append, record types, ids, helpers) and @tesseract/checkpointer-fs (CheckpointEnvelopeV1 + FsCheckpointStore). Adds vitest configs, scripts, @types/node devDependency, and updates the two feature task lists.

deferred_items.rationale: LLM-judge README contracts use TBD-on-commit content hashes and require the runner panel; deferred to the contract runner pass.
LangGraph BaseCheckpointSaver v1 conformance and Phoenix/Langfuse run-log opening are intentionally not wired in this slice; tracked as Phase 3 closure verification.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the human gate at the phase boundary, and observes the no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps observability and state artifacts traceable, with clear deferrals for downstream conformance gates.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice aligns with PRD §11 (run-logger and checkpointer-fs package responsibilities) and the run-log schema handbook for record fields.
